abstract: The object for defining a condition that, when met, causes conditional properties to go into effect.
overview:
## Discussion

Use the `Condition` object to define the condition under which the associated properties are applied.

You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalComponent], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalContainer], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalSection], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalText], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalComponentLayout], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalComponentStyle], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalComponentTextStyle], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalTextStyle], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalDocumentStyle], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalDivider], and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ConditionalAutoPlacement].

### Example
